notes: 60fps at 1440p - Arcade/Mission/Time Attack all work perfectly.
title: UNDER NIGHT IN-BIRTH Exe:Late[st]

notes: All modes including Network work perfectly. Was able to play online with no problems at all. haven't tried hosting a server but I would guess based on everything else it works fine. One very minor drawback is no steam cloud saves, so you'll have to redo any previously cleared missions, colors, or other collectables unlocked. Will save things unlocked in the linux version however.

notes: Game seems most stable when running under Proton 3.16-9. Movies don't work, but the game is fully playable otherwise including online. Later versions of Proton work fine in windowed mode, but often crash or display glitched graphics when running in full screen mode.
